positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric sloth hanging from a stylized jungle vine. The sloth has a serene, slightly comical expression. The composition is perfectly centered, with the sloth and vines forming clean, high-contrast silhouettes against a solid, vibrant teal background. The style should be clean vector art mixed with linocut engraving aesthetics, using bold black outlines and flat areas of color. Emphasize negative space and clean separation of forms. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Studio lighting, crisp edges, high resolution, vibrant color palette of emerald green, deep indigo, and charcoal black. Intricate but simplified patterns for the background vines.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur, realistic, photo, bokeh, bokeh blur, gradient, gradient colors, messy, rough
